title: Mini Block Miners
description: All updated Mini Block Miner Farms!
body:
# Mini Block Miners
**Welcome to Mini Block Miners!**

Ever wanted to build the most wonderful buildings in survival without having to grind for all the necesarry resources? Well fear not, because this datapack is just what you need!

Mini Block Miners makes it possible to build small Miner Farms to grind for all your resources! These resources go from dirt to end stone with more on the way!

**This datapack contains:**
- Stone Miner
- End Stond Miner
- Diorite Miner
- Granite Miner
- Obsidian Miner
- Glow Stone Miner
- Callcite & Tuff Miner
- Netherrack Miner
- Gravel Miner
- Sand Miner
- Amethyst Miner
- Dripstone Miner
- Magma & Ice Miner
- Clay Miner
- Blackstone Miner
- Dirt Miner
- Soulsand & Soulsoil Miner
- Mud Miner
- Terracotta Miner
- Glass Miner
- Concrete Miner
- Andesite Miner (built like diorite farm, except using andesite)

More Miners coming in the future!

**Loot Tables**
- Every Mini Miner's loottable exists of that of the block on top/item in item frame and all its variants.

**Building Guide**
- Every Miner is build using a dropper facing up with an item frame on its side.
- The Concrete Miner needs white concrete on top and the dye for the color you want in the item frame.
- For Miners (check image below):
![Block Miners](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f9c95e8af6324297d5558f720f87c8d2d413a56.png)
